docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STARKES, MAURICE
PLTF'S SUBPENA COPY SUBMITTED TO COURT, NO POS ATTACHED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHORNIST, SHIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARKES, MAURICE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STARKES, MAURICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ZHORNIST, SHIMON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY STARKES, MAURICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZHORNIST, SHIMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
